differential_diagnoses: Recurrent EBV-positive CNS diffuse large B-cell lymphoma
next_steps: Perform CSF PCR for Powassan virus, West Nile virus, Eastern Equine Encephalitis virus, JCV, HHV-6, EBV, and VZV.
Order serum and CSF arbovirus antibody panels (specifically for Powassan virus).
Perform repeat CSF flow cytometry and send for IgH gene rearrangement studies to rule out occult B-cell malignancy.
Obtain CD4+ T-cell count and quantitative immunoglobulins to further assess immune status.
Consider brain biopsy if CSF and serological workup remains unrevealing.
Consult neurology, infectious disease, and neuro-oncology for multidisciplinary management.
